name: settings-form
description: Build a settings form with Field composition, Switch toggles, and validation
prompt: Create a settings page with a form that has: an email input with validation, a notifications Switch toggle, and a theme Select dropdown. Use proper Field composition and show an error state on the email field.
expected_patterns: Field.Field wraps each control with Field.Label
data-invalid on Field.Field and aria-invalid on Input
Switch component for toggles, not checkbox

name: profile-dialog
description: Build a profile editor dialog with Avatar and icon buttons
prompt: Create a dialog that shows a user profile editor. It should have an Avatar with fallback initials, a name input, a bio textarea, and save/cancel buttons. The save button should have a check icon and the cancel button should have an X icon.
expected_patterns: No sizing classes on icons inside Button

name: dashboard-stats
description: Build a dashboard stats grid with Cards, Skeleton loading, and Badges
prompt: Create a responsive grid of 3 stat cards. Each card shows a metric name, value, and trend Badge. Add a loading state using Skeleton components. Use proper Card composition.
expected_patterns: Badge for trend indicators, not styled spans
